ability.en: You are safe from the Demon.

flavor_text.en: "As David said to Goliath, as Theseus said to the Minotaur, as Arjuna said to Bhagadatta... No."

examples: The Imp attacks the Soldier. The Soldier does not die, so nobody dies that night.
The Poisoner poisons the Soldier, then the Imp attacks the Soldier. The Soldier dies, since they have no ability.
The Imp attacks the Soldier. The Soldier dies, because they are actually the Drunk.
